center.name: 阿尔弗雷德·拉塞尔·华莱士
center.summary: 阿尔弗雷德·拉塞尔·华莱士是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联3种鸟类，包括Fairy gerygone、Tawny grassbird、淡色文鸟，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The fairy gerygone (Gerygone palpebrosa), previously known as the fairy warbler, is a species of bird in the family Acanthizidae native to New Guinea and Queensland

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The tawny grassbird (Cincloramphus timoriensis) is a large songbird that is a member of the family Locustellidae commonly found in grassland and reedbed habitats

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The pale-headed munia (Lonchura pallida) is a species of estrildid finch native to eastern Indonesia and Timor-Leste
